column1: APS NOTE
column2: CPUT uses a PERCENTAGE-BASED APS (not the 7-point NSC scale). Three methods apply: Method 1 = sum of best 6 subject percentages ÷ 10 (Life Orientation excluded). Method 2 = (English% + Maths%×2 + PhysSci%×2 + best other subject%) ÷ 10. Method 3 = (English% + Maths%×2 + Acc%×2 + 3 other subjects%) ÷ 10. NSC achievement levels: L7=80-100%
column7: L2=30-39%. Min APS shown is MAINSTREAM. ECP (Extended Curriculum Programme) has lower APS threshold — see Special_Notes per programme. Meeting minimum requirements does not guarantee admission. Applications are online and free. General closing date: 30 September 2025.
